description_long: This is a modern laptop with a brushed metallic silver lid featuring a prominent black alien head logo at its center. The chassis is slim and angular, with a matte black base and a full-sized keyboard that is backlit with multi-colored RGB lighting. The keyboard includes a function row and standard QWERTY layout, and the touchpad is centered below the spacebar. The screen is open, but the display appears to be off or in sleep mode, showing no visible content. Multiple ports are visible along the left and right edges, including USB and audio jacks. The overall design is sleek and high-tech, suitable for gaming or professional use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, metallic laptop with a black alien head logo, RGB backlit keyboard, and multiple side ports. The screen is open but turned off, and the design is modern and angular.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the brushed silver lid with a centered black alien head logo and the black base beneath.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile, RGB-lit keyboard, and several ports including USB and audio jacks.
description_view_2: The front view displays the open screen (off), full RGB keyboard, and centered touchpad.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the keyboard lighting and additional ports along the edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A black alien head logo is centered on the metallic silver lid, easily recognizable by its oval shape and stylized eyes.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row, RGB backlighting, and no visible numeric keypad.
